summary: Tested shared provider components (ProviderAppointments.tsx, ProviderNotes.tsx) for Doula and Midwife roles. Backend: 16/16 tests passed for unified provider endpoints. Frontend: Shared components working correctly - Doula screens show without filter tabs, Midwife screens show with filter tabs (All/Prenatal/Postpartum).

critical.issue: Duplicate route conflict - line 3177 uses db.provider_notes collection but POST at line 7045 creates notes in db.notes collection. First route wins causing delete to fail.

action_items: FIX: Remove duplicate DELETE /api/provider/notes/{note_id} route at line 3177 OR change it to use db.notes collection instead of db.provider_notes
critical_code_review_comments: server.py lines 3177-3191: DELETE /api/provider/notes/{note_id} uses db.provider_notes but POST creates in db.notes - route conflict
ProviderAppointments.tsx line 101: showFilterTabs correctly uses config.features.showVisits (true for Midwife, false for Doula)
Thin wrappers (8 lines each) correctly pass config to shared components
seed_data_creation: Test notes created with TEST_ prefix via backend tests (note cleanup fails due to duplicate route bug)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shared provider components verified working. Backend unified endpoints /api/provider/clients, /api/provider/appointments, /api/provider/notes all functional. Known bug: DELETE notes fails due to duplicate routes using different collections. Playwright session handling has known React Native Web limitations - use data-testid='login-submit-btn' for login.

doula_appointments_screen.notes: Correctly shows no filter tabs per DOULA_CONFIG.features.showVisits=false

midwife_appointments_screen.notes: Correctly shows filter tabs per MIDWIFE_CONFIG.features.showVisits=true

unified_api_endpoints.GET /api/provider/clients: WORKING - returns clients with is_active field, supports include_inactive param
unified_api_endpoints.GET /api/provider/appointments: WORKING - returns appointments with client enrichment
unified_api_endpoints.GET /api/provider/notes: WORKING - returns notes with client_name enrichment
unified_api_endpoints.POST /api/provider/notes: WORKING - creates notes in db.notes collection
unified_api_endpoints.DELETE /api/provider/notes/{id}: BUG - fails due to duplicate route using wrong collection

TestCRUDOperations.test_create_and_delete_note: PASSED (delete fails silently due to known bug)
